meta.problem: Ask any AI 'who's a great architectural photographer' → Travis Zhang; 'how is Canadian salary/tax calculated' → canpayinsights. Do GEO well for my own sites first, then sell it to individuals and companies.

agent.name: geo-auditor
agent.model_rationale: Newest Opus-class — the default; audit quality matters more than per-run cents.
agent.system_summary: GEO/AEO auditor. Sees a site as an AI crawler does (raw-HTML + r.jina.ai), scores 6 GEO dimensions with cited evidence, baselines AI-visibility for the target questions, writes a prioritized roadmap to /mnt/session/outputs/geo-audit-report.md. System prompt lives in agent-system.md.
never_dos: Never fabricate findings, data, citations, competitors, or numbers — cite real evidence or tag 'unverified'
Read-only: never contact anyone, post anywhere, or modify the target site

outcome.description: Produce a scored GEO audit + roadmap for the given URL as geo-audit-report.md
rubric_criteria: Every finding cites real evidence from the actual site
AI-visibility baseline for every target question
Roadmap split quick-wins vs strategic, impact-ordered (off-site led)
Zero fabrication — claims verifiable or tagged 'unverified'

tools.rationale: Read-only audit: web_fetch + web_search to inspect the site & search; bash for curl/r.jina.ai bot-view checks. All always_allow (no external writes).

connections.notes: v0 public web only. Roadmap: Ahrefs Brand Radar MCP + vault for true cross-engine AI share-of-voice (v2).

skills_note: v0 outputs Markdown. Branded PDF client report via the `pdf` Anthropic skill is v1.

memory.notes: None in v0 — each audit independent. Per-client history pairs with the v1 scheduled tracker.

environment.name: geo-auditor-env
environment.rationale: Must fetch arbitrary sites + r.jina.ai + search. curl/python3 are standard; no extra packages.

schedule.rationale: An audit runs when you have a site (yours today, a client's tomorrow). The recurring monthly visibility report is the v1 scheduled deployment.
schedule.kickoff: user.define_outcome (task from first_prompt.txt + rubric from outcome.md, max_iterations 3)

cases.name: case-01
cases.expected: evals/case-01/expected.md (saved from the first verified run — no prior golden audit)

cases.name: case-02
cases.expected: held back — different archetype regression check

cases.name: case-03
cases.expected: held back — tests the audit on a site we did NOT build

evals.notes: Case 1 = v0 input. No golden audit exists, so case-01's first verified report becomes its regression baseline. Cases 2–3 run after v0 passes via evals/run-evals.sh.

defaults_applied.write_actions: None in v0 — read-only audit; the doing (content/outreach) is v2

interface.who: Travis (solo); later individuals & companies as clients
interface.how: v0: report lands as a file, fetched via Files API / fetch.sh; Console for run history. Client-facing 'submit URL → get report' interface is v3.

next_directions.why_deferred: v1 — the retainer; directly measures 'is AI recommending me yet?' over time
next_directions.how: Scheduled deployment (cron, relative dates) re-asks the target questions monthly; report share-of-voice vs competitors

next_directions.why_deferred: v1 — a Markdown file isn't what you hand a paying client
next_directions.how: Attach the `pdf` Anthropic skill; render the audit as a branded report

next_directions.why_deferred: v2 — the audit finds gaps; this drafts what closes them (the off-site lever)
next_directions.how: Agent drafts answer-first content + Reddit answers + outreach emails; posting gated always_ask or mocked

next_directions.why_deferred: v2 — real cross-engine AI mention/SOV/cited-domains data beats self-asking
next_directions.how: Brand Radar MCP server + vault credential; feeds the monthly report
Your app calls the CMA API (session per client); vault per client if needed

next_directions.what: Re-run evals before promoting any new agent version
next_directions.how: evals/run-evals.sh against the new version; promote only when verdicts hold
